The detected n-grams are (a) the TinyStories opening phrasebook (`<s>â†’Once`, `Onceâ†’upon`, `uponâ†’a`, `thereâ†’was`,

the point: a 260K model on simple text genuinely *is* mostly an n-gram machine. Real models on real English need
